title: Portugal Legislative Election
description: Center-right Democratic Alliance (AD) wins snap election after PM Costa's resignation. Far-right Chega emerges as third-largest party in Portuguese parliament.

title: Finland Presidential Election
description: Alexander Stubb elected president in runoff against Jussi Halla-aho of the Finns Party, after incumbent Sauli Niinistö chose not to seek re-election.

title: Slovakia Presidential Election
description: Petr Pellegrini elected president in runoff, succeeding Zuzana Čaputová who chose not to run for re-election.

title: Lithuania Presidential Election
description: Incumbent Gitanas Nausėda re-elected president with strong public support for his stance on security and Ukraine.

title: Belgium Federal Election
description: Flemish nationalist N-VA becomes largest party, but coalition talks drag on for over 200 days amid regional tensions.

title: European Parliament Elections
description: EU citizens vote across 27 member states for 720 MEPs. Centre-right EPP remains largest group with 188 seats, far-right makes significant gains.

title: France Legislative Election
description: Snap election called by Macron after EU elections setback. Left-wing New Popular Front surprises with majority, leaving Macron in minority government.

title: UK General Election
description: Labour Party wins massive landslide, ending 14 years of Conservative rule. Keir Starmer becomes Prime Minister.

title: Croatia Parliamentary Election
description: HDZ wins narrow victory but loses absolute majority. Andrej Plenković continues as PM with HDZ-DPMIO coalition government.

title: Croatia Presidential Election
description: President Zoran Milanović wins re-election in tight race against centrist challenger Dragan Primorac.

title: Austria National Election
description: Freedom Party (FPÖ) becomes first far-right party to win national election in post-war Austria. Coalition negotiations begin without clear path to government.

title: Lithuania Parliamentary Election
description: Social Democrats (LSDP) win surprising victory, ending 24 years of centre-right dominance. Ingrida Šimonytė resigns as PM.

title: Bulgaria Parliamentary Election
description: GERB remains largest party but no stable government forms. Sixth consecutive election since 2021 produces further political deadlock.

title: Romania Presidential Election (Round 1, Annulled)
description: Pro-Russian candidate Călin Georgescu surprises with first-place finish. Constitutional Court later annuls election due to Russian TikTok manipulation allegations.

title: Romania Parliamentary Election
description: Pro-Western parties win majority but far-right AUR makes significant gains. Political fragmentation complicates coalition formation.

title: Denmark General Election
description: Mette Frederiksen's Social Democrats win again but lose parliamentary majority, leading to minority government formation.

title: Germany Federal Election
description: CDU/CSU wins decisive victory under Friedrich Merz. Coalition negotiations begin with SPD for 'Germany Alliance' government.

title: Estonia Parliamentary Election
description: Reform Party and Centre Party neck-and-neck. Coalition negotiations determine next government amid tight results.

title: Portugal Parliamentary Election
description: Democratic Alliance (AD) wins narrow majority. Luís Montenegro becomes PM, ending Socialist government era.

title: Poland Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Conservative Karol Nawrocki and centrist Rafał Trzaskowski advance to runoff in closely contested first round.

title: Poland Presidential Election (Runoff)
description: Karol Nawrocki wins closely contested presidential election against Warsaw mayor Rafał Trzaskowski in narrow runoff.

title: Romania Presidential Election (Round 1, Re-run)
description: George Simion (AUR) leads first round of re-run election following annulment of 2024 vote due to foreign interference.

title: Romania Presidential Election (Runoff)
description: Pro-EU Nicusor Dan defeats far-right George Simion in stunning comeback. Election seen as crucial test for Romania's Western alignment.

title: Greece Parliamentary Election
description: New Democracy wins second term under Kyriakos Mitsotakis with focus on economic growth and infrastructure development.

title: Ireland Presidential Election
description: Former Fine Gael leader runs in presidential election amid coalition government dynamics.

title: Malta General Election
description: Robert Abela's Labour Party wins third consecutive term with increased parliamentary majority.

title: Czech Republic Parliamentary Election
description: ODS and centre-right coalition maintains narrow majority. Petr Fiala continues as Prime Minister.

title: Slovenia Parliamentary Election
description: Robert Golob's Freedom Movement retains power with improved parliamentary majority.

title: Slovenia Parliamentary Election
description: Next scheduled parliamentary election following standard four-year legislative term.

title: Hungary Parliamentary Election
description: Fidesz expected to contest election amid EU concerns about democratic backsliding and rule of law.

title: Bulgaria Parliamentary Election
description: Snap election called after continued political deadlock. Eighth parliamentary election since 2021.

title: Portugal Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Marcelo Rebelo de Sousa does not stand for re-election. Multiple candidates contest presidency.

title: Portugal Presidential Election (Runoff)
description: Second round of presidential election if no candidate achieves absolute majority in first round.

title: Cyprus Presidential Election
description: Presidential election to elect leader of Republic of Cyprus. Incumbent Nikos Christodoulides eligible for re-election.

title: Sweden General Election
description: Next scheduled parliamentary election following four-year legislative term.

title: Latvia Parliamentary Election
description: Next scheduled Saeima election following constitutional four-year term.

title: Denmark General Election
description: Next scheduled parliamentary election by constitutional deadline.

title: Estonia Presidential Election
description: Presidential election to select head of state. Alar Karis does not stand for re-election.

title: Czech Republic Senate Election
description: Senate by-elections and partial renewal of one-third of Senate seats.

title: Finland Presidential Election
description: Presidential election to select head of state. Incumbent Alexander Stubb eligible for re-election.

title: Cyprus Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Austria Presidential Election
description: Presidential election to select head of state. Incumbent Alexander Van der Bellen eligible for re-election.

title: France Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Presidential election without incumbent Emmanuel Macron (term-limited). Multiple candidates from across political spectrum.

title: France Presidential Election (Runoff)
description: Second round of presidential election if no candidate achieves absolute majority.

title: France Legislative Election
description: Parliamentary elections following presidential election. Outcome shapes government formation.

title: Italy Parliamentary Election
description: Chamber of Deputies and Senate elections. Giorgia Meloni's Brothers of Italy faces electoral test.

title: Spain General Election
description: Congress of Deputies and Senate elections. Political fragmentation continues to challenge government formation.

title: Greece Parliamentary Election
description: Next scheduled parliamentary election following standard four-year legislative term.

title: Bulgaria Parliamentary Election
description: Next scheduled parliamentary election following constitutional four-year term.

title: Luxembourg General Election
description: Chamber of Deputies election following five-year legislative term.

title: Lithuania Parliamentary Election
description: Seimas election following four-year legislative term.

title: Belgium Federal Election
description: Federal elections to Chamber of Representatives and Senate following five-year term.

title: Austria National Election
description: National Council election following five-year legislative term.

title: Ireland General Election
description: Dáil Éireann election following five-year legislative term.

title: Portugal Parliamentary Election
description: Assembly of the Republic election following four-year legislative term.

title: European Parliament Elections
description: EU citizens across 27 member states elect 720 Members of European Parliament for 2029-2034 term.

title: Malta General Election
description: House of Representatives election following five-year legislative term.

title: Czech Republic Parliamentary Election
description: Chamber of Deputies election following four-year legislative term.

title: Croatia Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Romania Parliamentary Election
description: Parliamentary elections to Chamber of Deputies and Senate following four-year term.

title: Lithuania Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Poland Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Poland Presidential Election (Runoff)
description: Second round of presidential election if needed.

title: Slovakia Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle. President Pellegrini eligible for re-election.

title: Germany Federal Election
description: Bundestag election following four-year legislative term.

title: Sweden General Election
description: Riksdag election following four-year legislative term.

title: Slovenia Parliamentary Election
description: National Assembly election following four-year legislative term.

title: Hungary Parliamentary Election
description: National Assembly election following four-year legislative term.

title: Denmark General Election
description: Folketing election following constitutional four-year term deadline.

title: Estonia Parliamentary Election
description: Riigikogu election following four-year legislative term.

title: Latvia Parliamentary Election
description: Saeima election following four-year constitutional term.

title: Finland Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following six-year term cycle.

title: Cyprus Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Portugal Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Presidential election following five-year term cycle.

title: Ireland Presidential Election
description: Presidential election following seven-year term cycle.

title: European Parliament Elections
description: EU citizens elect Members of European Parliament for 2034-2039 term.

title: Treaty of Rome
description: Six founding members sign the Treaty of Rome, establishing the European Economic Community (EEC).

title: France Ratifies Treaty
description: French National Assembly ratifies the Treaty of Rome, paving way for EEC implementation.

title: Germany Joins EEC
description: West Germany becomes founding member of the European Economic Community.

title: Euro Currency Launch
description: Euro is introduced as an accounting currency. Euro banknotes and coins enter circulation in 2002.

title: Ireland Joins Euro
description: Ireland adopts the euro as part of the initial Eurozone launch.

title: Netherlands Euro Entry
description: Netherlands transitions to the euro currency.

title: Biggest EU Expansion
description: Ten new countries join the EU in the largest expansion, including Central and Eastern European nations.

title: Poland Joins EU
description: Poland, the largest of the 2004 expansion countries, joins the European Union.

title: Hungary EU Membership
description: Hungary becomes member of the European Union with the 2004 expansion.

title: Treaty of Lisbon
description: Treaty of Lisbon is signed, reforming EU institutions and establishing the European Union as a legal entity.

title: Brexit
description: United Kingdom officially leaves the European Union after 47 years of membership.

title: EU Candidate Status for Ukraine
description: Ukraine is granted EU candidate status, a historic decision amid the Russia-Ukraine war.

title: Moldova EU Candidacy
description: Moldova also receives EU candidate status alongside Ukraine.

title: Georgia EU Perspective
description: Georgia is granted EU candidate perspective amid ongoing reforms.

title: Eurozone Expansion
description: Croatia becomes the 20th member of the Eurozone, adopting the euro currency.

title: European Parliament Elections
description: EU citizens vote in EP elections across 27 member states. Centre-right EPP remains largest.

title: Germany EP Election
description: German voters elect their MEPs in the 2024 European Parliament elections.

title: France EP Election
description: French citizens vote in the 2024 European Parliament elections.

title: New Commission Takes Office
description: New European Commission under President begins term with focus on competitiveness and green transition.

title: EU Constitution Renewal Debate
description: Member states begin negotiations on EU constitutional reforms to improve decision-making.

title: Western Balkans Accession
description: New Western Balkan countries begin accession talks for EU membership.

title: Albania Accession Talks
description: Albania begins formal EU accession negotiations.

title: KosovoEU Talks
description: Kosovo begins EU visa liberalization dialogue.

title: Attention Is All You Need
description: Transformer architecture introduced—based entirely on self-attention, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions. Foundation of all modern LLMs.

title: GPT-2: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners
description: Demonstrated that large models can perform zero-shot tasks without explicit fine-tuning—scaling unlocks emergent abilities.

title: Codex: Evaluating Large Language Models Trained on Code
description: LLMs fine-tuned on GitHub code for code generation. Introduced HumanEval benchmark. Powers GitHub Copilot.

title: InstructGPT / RLHF
description: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback aligns models with user intent. 1.3B model preferred over 175B GPT-3.

title: Chain of Thought Prompting
description: Few-shot examples with reasoning steps enable models to solve multi-step problems—emergent property of model scale.

title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting
description: Interleaves reasoning traces with tool actions—model reasons, calls APIs, incorporates feedback. Enables grounded tool use.

title: Toolformer: Self-Taught Tool Use
description: Language models learn to use external APIs (calculator, search, Q&A) via self-supervised fine-tuning with minimal demos.

title: Reflexion: Verbal Reinforcement
description: Agents reflect on feedback and store experiences in memory to improve future decisions—without weight updates. 91% on HumanEval.

title: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback
description: Models generate, critique, and iteratively improve outputs using self-feedback—enhances code quality via test-time computation.

title: API-Bank: Tool-Augmented LLMs Benchmark
description: Native structured tool schemas added to model inputs—standardized code execution, compiler calls, and custom tool invocations.

title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
description: Open standard by Anthropic for connecting AI assistants to external tools and data sources via universal client-server protocol.

title: MCP Security Frameworks
description: Enterprise-grade security extensions for MCP—defense-in-depth, threat modeling, and tool poisoning mitigation.

title: RoleLLM: Role-Playing Prompting
description: System prompts define agent roles and expertise—improves consistency and domain specialization for coding tasks.

title: LLM Agents: The Rise and Potential of Agentic Systems
description: Native agent architectures with built-in loops: plan → execute → observe → reflect. Autonomous multi-step workflows.

title: Plan-and-Solve Prompting
description: Decompose complex tasks into executable plans before action—improves zero-shot planning for agents.

title: Code Agents with REPL
description: Agents use Read-Eval-Print Loop for interactive planning—flexibly correct errors and handle tasks dynamically.

title: Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration
description: Multiple specialist agents (planner, coder, reviewer, tester) coordinate via shared context—mimics real dev teams.

title: Zehnder's Original Interferometer
description: Ludwig Zehnder invents the interferometer (Ein neuer Interferenzrefraktor), pioneering beam-splitter design for measuring refractive index variations.

title: Mach's Refinement
description: Ludwig Mach refines Zehnder's design, creating stable interference fringes. The apparatus bears both inventors' names.

title: Two-Photon Interference
description: First demonstration of two-photon interference using entangled photons in MZI, showing quantum non-classical correlations.

title: Elitzur–Vaidman Bomb Tester
description: Introduces interaction-free measurement—detecting object presence without physically interacting, using quantum superposition in MZI.

title: Experimental IFM Realized
description: First experimental verification of Elitzur-Vaidman bomb tester using single photons—25% detection efficiency achieved.

title: Electronic MZI
description: First electronic MZI using edge states in 2D electron gas (QHE regime)—62% visibility, opens path to fractional charge measurement.

title: Past of a Quantum Particle
description: Vaidman's weak measurement analysis of nested MZI claims 'discontinuous trajectories'—sparking major foundations debate.

title: Quantum Trajectories Debate
description: Li et al. challenge Vaidman's interpretation—argues results align with standard quantum mechanics. Heated exchange in Phys. Rev. A.

title: Experimental Past Detection
description: Danon et al. experimentally realize 'past of photon' detection—photons detected at paths they didn't traverse.

title: Consistent Histories Analysis
description: Robert Griffiths applies consistent histories formalism to nested MZI—challenges both Vaidman and counterfactual communication proposals.

title: Disconnected Trajectories Paradox
description: Nikolaev shows results explained classically without 'discontinuous trajectories'—challenges Vaidman's interpretation.

title: Graphene Electronic MZI
description: First high-visibility (98%) electronic MZI in graphene using spin/valley-polarized edge channels—robust to dephasing.

title: Wave-Particle Duality Test
description: Breaks traditional V² + D² ≤ 1 limit using weak-measurement MZI—achieving V² + D² ≈ 1.63.

title: Higher Order Weak Values
description: Recent re-examination of weak value phenomena in nested MZIs—extending path integral frameworks.

title: Heisenberg-Scale Estimation
description: Achieves Heisenberg-limited precision for simultaneous two-phase estimation using squeezed + coherent states.

title: Automated MZI Control
description: High-precision arbitrary magnitude/phase setting (7-8 bit resolution) for scalable photonic computing.

title: Fiber Phase Locking
description: New method for arbitrary-phase locking in fiber MZIs—enables 99.3% visibility for quantum networks.

title: Quantum Parameter Estimation Limits
description: Critical analysis exposing QFI overoptimism in MZI models—proper constraints needed for realistic experiments.

title: Nanoparticle Matter-Wave MZI
description: Matter-wave interference with 7,000-atom nanoparticles—macroscopicity μ = 15.5, surpassing previous by order of magnitude.

title: Quantum Wavemetry
description: New approach using coherence de Broglie wavelength for superresolution—loss tolerant without N00N states.
